name: Bell Pepper Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat broiler.
2. Place bell peppers under broiler and lightly char, turning to grill all sides.
3. Remove from broiler to a paper bag. Close the paper bag and set aside until cool.
4. When peppers are cool, peel, core, seed, and cut into strips.
5. Arrange peppers on a platter, alternating colors so they form a petal pattern.
6. Spoon dressing over the peppers.
7. Sprinkle with black pepper.
8. Garnish with capers and serve warm or chilled.
